/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/spin.h File Reference

Spin-based memory synchronization primitives for use with one-task-per-core applications. More...


Data Structures

struct  tmc_spin_mutex_t
 A shared memory spinlock data structure. More...
struct  tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t
 A shared memory, spinning, fair mutex. More...
struct  tmc_spin_rwlock_t
 A shared memory reader/writer spinlock data structure. More...
struct  tmc_spin_barrier_t
 A shared memory, spin-based barrier structure. More...
struct  tmc_spin_cond_t
 A shared memory, spin-based condition variable. More...

Defines

#define TMC_SPIN_MUTEX_INIT   { 0 }
 Static initializer for a tmc_spin_mutex_t.
#define TMC_SPIN_QUEUED_MUTEX_INIT   { 0 }
 Static initializer for a tmc_spin_mutex_t.
#define TMC_SPIN_RWLOCK_INIT   { 0 }
 Static initializer for a tmc_spin_rwlock_t.
#define TMC_SPIN_BARRIER_INIT(NUM_TASKS)   { __TMC_SPIN_BARRIER_VALUE(0, (NUM_TASKS), (NUM_TASKS)) }
 Static initializer for a tmc_spin_barrier_t.
#define TMC_SPIN_BARRIER_ALL   0
 Pass this value to the barrier initializer to create a barrier across all BME cores.
#define TMC_SPIN_COND_INIT   { { 0 }, { 0 } }
 Static initializer for a tmc_spin_cond_t.

Functions

static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_mutex_init (tmc_spin_mutex_t *mutex)
 Initialize a mutex to the unlocked state.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_mutex_lock (tmc_spin_mutex_t *mutex)
 Lock a mutex.
static __USUALLY_INLINE int tmc_spin_mutex_trylock (tmc_spin_mutex_t *mutex)
 Try to lock a mutex, but return immediately.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_mutex_unlock (tmc_spin_mutex_t *mutex)
 Release an already held mutex.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_queued_mutex_init (tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *mutex)
 Initialize a mutex to the unlocked state.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_queued_mutex_lock (tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *mutex)
 Lock a queued mutex.
int tmc_spin_queued_mutex_trylock (tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *mutex)
 Try to lock a queued mutex, but return immediately.
static __inline void tmc_spin_queued_mutex_unlock (tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *mutex)
 Release an already held queued mutex.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_init (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Initialize an rwlock to the unlocked state.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_rdlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Lock an rwlock for reading.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_wrlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Lock an rwlock for writing.
static __USUALLY_INLINE int tmc_spin_rwlock_tryrdlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Try to read-lock an rwlock, but return immediately.
static __USUALLY_INLINE int tmc_spin_rwlock_trywrlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Try to write-lock an rwlock, but return immediately.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_rdunlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Release an rwlock that was locked for reading.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_wrunlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Release an rwlock that was locked for writing.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_rwlock_unlock (tmc_spin_rwlock_t *rwlock)
 Release an rwlock that was locked for reading or writing.
static __inline void tmc_spin_barrier_init (tmc_spin_barrier_t *barrier, unsigned num_tasks)
 Initialize a barrier to the state in which no tasks have arrived at the barrier.
int tmc_spin_barrier_wait (tmc_spin_barrier_t *barrier)
 Wait until the specified number of tasks have arrived at a barrier.
static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_spin_cond_init (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond)
 Initialize a condvar to have no waiters.
int tmc_spin_cond_timedwait_spin (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond, tmc_spin_mutex_t *lock, const struct timespec *abstime)
 Wait until the given tmc_spin_cond_t has been signaled.
int tmc_spin_cond_timedwait_queued (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond, tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *lock, const struct timespec *abstime)
 Wait until the given tmc_spin_cond_t has been signaled.
int tmc_spin_cond_timedout (const struct timespec *ts)
 Specify a function that implements what a timeout means for BME.
static __USUALLY_INLINE int tmc_spin_cond_wait_spin (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond, tmc_spin_mutex_t *lock)
 Wait forever until the given tmc_spin_cond_t has been signaled.
static __USUALLY_INLINE int tmc_spin_cond_wait_queued (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond, tmc_spin_queued_mutex_t *lock)
 Wait forever until the given tmc_spin_cond_t has been signaled.
int tmc_spin_cond_signal (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond)
 Signal one of the tasks that are blocked on the condition variable.
int tmc_spin_cond_broadcast (tmc_spin_cond_t *cond)
 Signal all of the tasks that are blocked on the condition variable.

Detailed Description

Spin-based memory synchronization primitives for use with one-task-per-core applications.
